prompt: Capture Cursor candidate artifacts as hash-addressed records suitable for downstream FusionKit benchmark joins. Do not include a finished patch in the prompt.
expected_evidence: Artifacts are referenced by id, kind, and hash.
Raw workspace or transcript contents are not embedded in the benchmark row.
Candidate artifact records can join to a harness run result.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen harness task; contains no customer data, benchmark answer, or patch solution.
